steps.t: Mizâdi stands at Ingar-garâsh in southern Kighân.
Rahâzi is at Ingar-garâsh in southern Kighân.
Mizâdi has charged you with the tasks her soldiers would have accomplished if they did not now need to provide aid and recompense to the farmers of So…
The provisioner Dunaïl stands at Ingar-garâsh.
Mizâdi is at Ingar-garâsh in southern Kighân.
Rahâzi is at Ingar-garâsh in southern Kighân.
